# MEOK AI Labs — Blog

> Articles on the EU AI Act, sovereign AI infrastructure, Ed25519 attestations, MCP compliance, and the .ai brand.

## Posts

1. **49 days to the EU AI Act Article 50 cliff** — 2026-06-14, Nicholas Templeman. €15M or 3% of global turnover exposure. Trigger = user, not HQ. MEOK is the audit pipeline.
2. **Why we chose Ed25519 over RSA for compliance attestations** — 2026-06-13, Nicholas Templeman. Smaller signatures, no padding oracle history, sigstore-compatible. Survives 7-year retention.
3. **The 32-server MCP fleet: how MEOK got from 0 to compliance-as-a-service in 4 days** — 2026-06-12, Nicholas Templeman. `pip install meok-governance-engine-mcp` + a free-tier /sign call → instant signed attestation.
4. **Why MEOK is sovereign UK infrastructure (and why that matters)** — 2026-06-11, Nicholas Templeman. CSOAI Ltd, UK 16939677. Article 10 data governance duties are real.
5. **How a UK challenger bank got a regulator-grade signed Article 50 attestation in 4 days** — 2026-06-10, Nicholas Templeman. £15K vs Deloitte £180K. 4 days vs 8 weeks. Signed cert.
6. **The .ai brand: why one domain absorbs every hive** — 2026-06-09, Nicholas Templeman. proofof.ai + csoai.org + compliance.meok.ai + wowmcp.ai + hive. One meok.ai brand.
